name: Pepperoni Onion Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions with oil and butter in a skillet over low heat until well done, stirring often. Do not brown.
2. Sprinkle with flour and continue cooking slowly about 2 minutes.
3. Cool well.
4. Beat eggs; add half and half, yogurt, salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
5. Add to cooled onions.
6. Sprinkle half the cheese on the bottom of the pre-baked pastry shell and fill with egg-onion mixture.
7. Arrange pepperoni slices on top.
8. Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
9. Bake 10 minutes at 450 degrees. Reduce heat to 300 degrees and bake 20 more minutes.
